title: Great Is Thy Faithfulness
verse1: Great is Thy faithfulness, O God my Father
There is no shadow of turning with Thee
verse2: Summer and winter and springtime and harvest
Sun, moon and stars in their courses above
verse3: Pardon for sin and a peace that endureth
Thine own dear presence to cheer and to guide
chorus: Great is Thy faithfulness! Great is Thy faithfulness!
Morning by morning new mercies I see
